tasks.summary: Created package.json, installed micromatch and fs-extra, created sync_repo.js with CLI arg parsing, created lib/ and test/ dirs
Created lib/shared.js and test/shared.test.js — 13 tests passing for normalizePath, parseProdinclude, isFileMatch, shouldSkipFile
Created lib/walker.js and test/walker.test.js — 3 tests passing for walkTree with pruning
Created lib/guards.js and test/guards.test.js — 7 tests passing for direction guards
Created lib/dev2prod.js and test/dev2prod.test.js — 5 tests passing
Created lib/prod2dev.js and test/prod2dev.test.js — 4 tests passing
Created lib/prune.js and test/prune.test.js — 8 tests passing including symlink escape, path traversal, dry-run
Created test/integration.test.js — full round-trip test passing
